priority_legend.HIGH: Hard compliance violations — failure always triggers REJECTED, no exceptions (A2, B1, B7, C1, C2, E3)
priority_legend.MEDIUM: Legally significant but require judgment — failure triggers ESCALATE_TO_HUMAN (A1, D1, D2)
priority_legend.LOW: Business policy check — skipped when no PO reference, failure noted in reasoning (E1)

A1.resolver_impact: ESCALATE_TO_HUMAN if format is clearly invalid; APPROVED with note if minor OCR artefact
A1.notes: Regex match against Indian invoice number conventions. OCR normalisation applied before matching (O->0, I->1, l->1). Multiple patterns cover B2B, export, and composite formats.

A2.resolver_impact: REJECTED — no exceptions, applies to both exact and near-duplicates (>=95% similarity)
A2.notes: Stateful cross-invoice duplicate detection within a batch using a GSTIN::invoice_number::amount::date compound key. 365-day rolling window gates which stored entries are eligible for comparison. The 95% similarity threshold is computed across three fields (GSTIN, invoice_number, amount) — date gates the window but is not included in the ratio. Any invoice that clears 95% average similarity is treated as a duplicate.

B1.notes: Two-stage: (1) 15-char alphanumeric regex with OCR correction at digit positions, (2) active-status lookup via Mock GSTIN API. Truncated GSTIN (<15 chars after OCR correction) triggers HOLD_FOR_VERIFICATION. Confidence drops to 0.70 if API unavailable.

B7.notes: GST type consistency: intra-state uses equal CGST+SGST, inter-state uses IGST only. Mixed usage always INVALID. RCM and foreign-vendor invoices skipped with pass. Invoices in March-April GST transition period flagged with confidence 0.70.

C1.notes: quantity x rate = amount for every line item. Rs 1 rounding tolerance. Credit note negative amounts handled correctly. Errors reported per line.

C2.notes: Sum of all line item amounts must equal the stated subtotal. Rs 1 rounding tolerance. Credit notes with negative amounts handled correctly.

D1.resolver_impact: ESCALATE_TO_HUMAN if TDS classification is ambiguous or confidence < 0.70
D1.notes: TDS applicability determined by LLM using vendor type, invoice amount, and tds_sections.json. Rules applied based on invoice_date financial year, not processing date. Result cached for D2. Conflict with B7 RCM flag triggers ESCALATE_TO_HUMAN.

D2.resolver_impact: ESCALATE_TO_HUMAN if section or rate is ambiguous or confidence < 0.70
D2.notes: TDS section, rate, and amount. Reads D1 cache (no extra LLM call). Covers 194C, 194J, 194H, 194I, 194Q, 195. LDC, 206AB, DTAA, no-PAN 20% handled. LLM arithmetic sanity-checked and corrected.

E1.resolver_impact: ESCALATE_TO_HUMAN only if PO amount present and variance exceeds tolerance; skipped with no penalty when no PO amount
E1.notes: Invoice total within +/-5% of PO amount. Frequently skipped when no po_amount on invoice.

E3.notes: Vendor GSTIN must be in approved registry AND status must be ACTIVE. SUSPENDED vendors fail even if present. OCR correction applied before lookup.
